title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited:
Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric Advisory Limited!
